hint_dist_user.name: blitz
hint_dist_user.description: Draft hint distribution for variable win conditions.

Colossus (Spirit Temple).text: They say that the final reward from the #Frogs of Zora's River# is #a Blue Rupee#.

DMC (Bombable Wall).text: They say that #Sacred Forest Meadow# is on the path of #the Forest#.

DMT (Biggoron).text: They say that plundering #Shadow Temple# is a foolish choice.

DMT (Storms Grotto).text: One who does not have Triforce can't go in.

Dodongos Cavern (Bombable Wall).text: They say that plundering #Goron City# is a foolish choice.

GC (Maze).text: They say that the final reward from the #Frogs of Zora's River# is #a Blue Rupee#.

GC (Medigoron).text: They say that slaying #50 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Arrows (10 pieces)#.

GV (Waterfall).text: They say that those who seek #sunken silver rupees# will find #a Deku Stick#.

Graveyard (Shadow Temple).text: They say that slaying #50 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Arrows (10 pieces)#.

HC (Malon).text: They say that a #ravaged village# mourns with #the Song of Time#.

HC (Rock Wall).text: They say that slaying #30 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Arrows (5 pieces)#.

HC (Storms Grotto).text: I'll make you eat those words.

HF (Near Market Grotto).text: They say that Bongo Bongo really hates the cold.

HF (Open Grotto).text: They say that Zelda is a poor leader.

HF (Southeast Grotto).text: They say that invisible ghosts can be exposed with Deku Nuts.

KF (Deku Tree Left).text: They say that #the Graveyard# is on the path of #the Emerald#.

KF (Deku Tree Right).text: They say that plundering #Death Mountain Trail# is a foolish choice.

KF (Outside Storms).text: They say that slaying #30 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Arrows (5 pieces)#.

KF (Storms Grotto).text: I bet you'd like to have more bombs.

LH (Lab).text: They say that the #Ocarina of Time# teaches #the Prelude of Light#.

LH (Southeast Corner).text: They say that plundering #Death Mountain Trail# is a foolish choice.

LH (Southwest Corner).text: They say that #the Graveyard# is on the path of #the Emerald#.

LW (Bridge).text: They say that #Sacred Forest Meadow# is on the path of #the Forest#.

LW (Near Shortcuts Grotto).text: They say that bombing the hole Volvagia last flew into can be rewarding.

SFM (Maze Lower).text: They say that slaying #40 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Bombs (10 pieces)#.

SFM (Maze Upper).text: They say that slaying #40 Gold Skulltulas# reveals #Bombs (10 pieces)#.

SFM (Saria).text: They say that a #ravaged village# mourns with #the Song of Time#.

ToT (Left).text: They say that plundering #Shadow Temple# is a foolish choice.

ToT (Left-Center).text: They say that the #Skull Mask# yields #a Heart Container#.

ToT (Right).text: They say that #Kakariko Village# is on the path of #the Emerald#.

ToT (Right-Center).text: They say that the #Ocarina of Time# teaches #the Prelude of Light#.

ZD (Mweep).text: They say that the #Skull Kid# grants #the Biggoron Sword#.

ZF (Fairy).text: They say that plundering #Goron City# is a foolish choice.

ZF (Jabu).text: They say that the #crater's melody# is #the Bolero of Fire#.

ZR (Near Domain).text: They say that the #Skull Mask# yields #a Heart Container#.

ZR (Near Grottos).text: They say that #Kakariko Village# is on the path of #the Emerald#.

ZR (Open Grotto).text: The single rupee is a unique item.
